title: Carry On Wayward Son
album: Live at the Syria Mosque, Pittsburgh PA 30th Oct 1976 - Remastered
why_this_song: Carry On Wayward Son by Kansas (1976) — selected for the English-through-music catalog. Use the sing-along prompts and exercises to drill pronunciation, vocabulary, and listening comprehension.

vocab_hooks.note: Appears 6 times; first heard in: "Carry on my wayward son"

Appears 4 times; first heard in: "There'll be peace when you are done"

teaching_notes_md:
## Teaching notes

- Times are estimated from community-synced lyrics and may be off by 1–2 seconds.
- Start with the sing-along prompt, then move to listen-and-fill.
- For B1+ students, focus on the discussion questions.

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "carry" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "carry" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "don't" in the whole song?

excerpts.text: There'll be peace when you are done
It surely means that I don't know
Carry on, you will always remember

exercises.prompt_en: "Carry On Wayward Son" was released in 1976. Do you think the themes in the song are timeless, or do they feel dated? Give one example from the lyrics.
exercises.prompt_pt: "Carry On Wayward Son" foi lançada em 1976. Você acha que os temas da música são atemporais ou já parecem datados? Dê um exemplo do que ouviu.

exercises.prompt_en: Imagine you are making a short film with "Carry On Wayward Son" as the soundtrack. What scene would you show while the chorus plays?
exercises.prompt_pt: Imagine que você vai fazer um curta com "Carry On Wayward Son" como trilha sonora. Que cena você mostraria no momento do refrão?

exercises.prompt_en: The singer makes a claim or statement in this song. Do you agree with it? Use evidence from the lyrics to support your answer.
exercises.prompt_pt: O cantor faz uma afirmação nessa música. Você concorda? Use pelo menos um verso para defender sua resposta.

exercises.prompt_en: Write the full form of each contraction:
exercises.prompt_pt: Escreva a forma completa de cada contração:
